title: Lord Sheraton Caretaker Wood Balsam 125ml Clear– Natural Beeswax Enriched Polish for Wood Furniture – Cleans, Nourishes & Protects for a Lasting Shine
features: Deep Nourishment: Caretaker Wood Balsam penetrates deep into the wood, nourishing and rejuvenating it from within for long-lasting vitality
Restores Natural Beauty: Our balsam restores the natural beauty of your wood furniture, enhancing its appearance with a rich, lustrous finish.
Easy Application: With a simple application process, our balsam makes wood care effortless. Just apply, spread evenly, and buff to reveal a stunning shine. ADD TO BASKET now
Protective Barrier: Formulated to create a protective barrier, our balsam shields your wood from damage caused by moisture, heat, and daily wear and tear.
Versatile Use: Suitable for all types of wood, including furniture, floors, and more, our balsam offers versatile care for your entire home.
description: From the manufacturer Lord Sheraton Wood and Leather Care Lord Sheraton offers a range of high-quality care products for leather and wood surfaces. The Wood Care Range includes the Wood Balsam, made from pure beeswax, pine turpentine, and linseed oil, providing intensive care for wooden surfaces. This traditional formula nourishes and cleans wood furniture, offering lasting shine and protection without water or synthetic waxes. In addition to wood care, Lord Sheraton offers Leather Balsam and Leather Shine Spray for leather items. These products are crafted with natural ingredients to rejuvenate, protect, and enhance the beauty of both wood and leather surfaces effectively. Lord Sheraton's commitment to quality ensures that their products maintain the appearance and longevity of furniture and belongings. Lord Sheraton Caretaker Wood Balsam 125ml Lord Sheraton Caretaker Wood Balsam is the ideal way to care for your wood furniture. Based on a traditional formulation, it will intensively nourish and clean your wood furniture, giving lasting shine and protection. Lord Sheraton Caretaker Wood Balsam is a blend of pure beeswax, pine turpentine and linseed oil. It contains no water or synthetic waxes.
